title: Pocket Dimension
body:
Ever wanted your own island to build your perfect base on? Look no further, Pocket Dimension is what you want. An overworld that's based on the end islands, this island is briming with ores, amethyst geodes, dungeons, and a mineshaft.

### Main Features
- A new dimension that can be accessed easily/early
- You can take other entities on leads/boats with you
- The dimension is rich in resources and dungeons
- Comes with a mineshaft
- A way to get back without the portal (in case you lose it) (`/trigger pd_return`)
- One main island, then scattered islands beyond

There is no tall grass or flowers needed to clear out, or giant forests to be chopped; everything's all ready for building. It's a small island, but don't think that means it doesn't have resources. There's plenty.

How do you get there? Craft a portal with 8 tinted glass, and 1 obsidian or crying obsidian.
This dimension was designed to be accessed early in any world as a safe haven. You could use the portal to escape dangerous situations and heal up on the pocket island and return anytime you'd like. The portal can be used an infinite number of times. No durability, or EXP costs.

Want to bring your horse or villagers with you to the pocket dimension? Well, just grab a lead and leash the entity you wish to take with you. For villagers, put one or two in a boat, and then leash the boat. You could even take other players to the dimension if they're in the leaded boat.

What if you lose the portal in the pocket dimension? How does one return?
Anyone can teleport back anytime with `/trigger pd_return`

This mod wasn't tested on multiplayer, but it has support for it. The island would be a shared paradise. The main island is in the middle, but just like in the end, you can find more beyond that island after some travel.

Craft portal with tinted glass and obsidian/crying obsidian.

![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5Qa6eSjF/images/cb192de25f09cd4c72c1f47928593ff6655c50d4.png)
![The main island](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5Qa6eSjF/images/0a9d160f97ebd4bc04f057bae8c3b087a4d01aa1.png)
Why is the grass blue in versions prior to 1.1.0? Well, the answer of lore is that the grass is just enriched with nutrients that changes its color. The logical answer is that I've always wanted a dimension with blue leaves and grass. I've since gotten over the blue fantasy, and the foliage color is now green as it should be.

Enjoying it? Check out [my other mods](https://modrinth.com/user/Pepsied)
